tools.name: c2n_fetch_page
tools.description: Fetch a Confluence page by ID or URL and return its raw XHTML body plus metadata. Read-only.

pageIdOrUrl.description: Confluence page ID or full page URL.

baseUrl.description: Optional Confluence base URL override; falls back to CONFLUENCE_BASE_URL.

tools.name: c2n_convert_page
tools.description: Convert a Confluence XHTML body into Notion blocks using the deterministic converter and the current ruleset. Read-only.

xhtml.description: Confluence storage-format XHTML for a single page.

pageId.description: Optional source page ID; threaded into unresolved entries.

title.description: Optional source page title for diagnostic logging.

tools.name: c2n_list_runs
tools.description: List migration runs recorded under output/runs/. Read-only.

rootDir.description: Optional alternate runs root; defaults to ./output/runs.

tools.name: c2n_get_run_report
tools.description: Read the report.json for a migration run by its slug. Read-only.

tools.name: c2n_list_unresolved
tools.description: List the questions to ask the human for a migration run: parsed entries from output/runs/<slug>/resolution.json keyed by unresolved-item id. Read-only.

rootDir.description: Optional alternate runs root; defaults to ./output/runs.

tools.name: c2n_propose_resolution
tools.description: Append a single ProposedRule to proposals.json so the discover-pipeline ruleset can be regenerated. Defaults proposalsPath to <cwd>/output/proposals.json.

rule_id.description: Unique rule identifier; rejected when already present in proposals.json.

source_pattern_id.description: Pattern ID this rule answers, from output/patterns.json.

source_description.description: Human-readable description of the source pattern being mapped.

notion_block_type.description: Notion block type the converter will emit for matches.

mapping_description.description: How the source XHTML maps onto the Notion block type.

example_input.description: Example XHTML snippet the rule applies to.

example_output.description: Example Notion block payload produced by the rule.

proposalsPath.description: Optional override for proposals.json path; defaults to ./output/proposals.json.

tools.name: c2n_finalize_proposals
tools.description: Materialize output/proposals.json into output/rules.json by enabling every proposed rule. Same logic as the `c2n finalize` CLI command.

proposalsPath.description: Optional override for proposals.json path; defaults to ./output/proposals.json.

rulesOutPath.description: Optional override for rules.json output path; defaults to ./output/rules.json.

tools.name: c2n_record_migration
tools.description: Record a Notion page ID created by the host runtime against a Confluence page in this c2n run; persists to output/runs/<slug>/mapping.json. Write.

confluencePageId.description: Source Confluence page ID being recorded.

notionPageId.description: Notion page ID created by the host runtime.

slug.description: Run slug (directory name under output/runs/) the mapping belongs to.

notionUrl.description: Optional Notion page URL for downstream reporting.

rootDir.description: Optional alternate runs root; defaults to ./output/runs.
